channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: The United States and Iran exchanged strikes aimed at infras…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The United States and Iran exchanged strikes aimed at infrastructure and military targets on Saturday as their battle over the Strait of Hormuz intensified. n.pr/3QXSUzO
item.content:encoded: The United States and Iran exchanged strikes aimed at infrastructure and military targets on Saturday as their battle over the Strait of Hormuz intensified. n.pr/3QXSUzO

item.title: The betting site Kalshi emerged as a dominant sports betting…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The betting site Kalshi emerged as a dominant sports betting platform during the World Cup. But the company avoids billions of dollars in taxes by insisting it is not a sports gambling operator. n.pr/4foSwm3
item.content:encoded: The betting site Kalshi emerged as a dominant sports betting platform during the World Cup. But the company avoids billions of dollars in taxes by insisting it is not a sports gambling operator. n.pr/4foSwm3

item.title: With a photo of a vampire fish, he concluded: “OUR HOMEGROWN…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: With a photo of a vampire fish, he concluded: “OUR HOMEGROWN GRIFTERS DONT YET HAVE ENOUGH CLOUT TO WARRANT MORE THAN A PASSING PISS - FARAGE, WAXY LEMON, LOWE, SOOTY AND SWEEP ETC ETC - LICKSPITTLE BOTTOM FEEDERS ALL - BUT IF THE REAL FUCKERS KEEP WEARING US DOWN WITHOUT A REAL PUSH BACK… COME ON!”
item.content:encoded: With a photo of a vampire fish, he concluded: “OUR HOMEGROWN GRIFTERS DONT YET HAVE ENOUGH CLOUT TO WARRANT MORE THAN A PASSING PISS - FARAGE, WAXY LEMON, LOWE, SOOTY AND SWEEP ETC ETC - LICKSPITTLE BOTTOM FEEDERS ALL - BUT IF THE REAL FUCKERS KEEP WEARING US DOWN WITHOUT A REAL PUSH BACK… COME ON!”

item.title: The Cure's Robert Smith returned to X tonight after stepping…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: The Cure's Robert Smith returned to X tonight after stepping away from the platform in January 2025, quoting a US election official's rejection of Trump's latest voter fraud claims and boosting a 🤮 reaction to a video from today's Infantino/Trump press conference
item.content:encoded: The Cure's Robert Smith returned to X tonight after stepping away from the platform in January 2025, quoting a US election official's rejection of Trump's latest voter fraud claims and boosting a 🤮 reaction to a video from today's Infantino/Trump press conference

item.title: When Solitaire Miles was 18, she had a stroke. When she got …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: When Solitaire Miles was 18, she had a stroke. When she got to the hospital, doctors and nurses accused her of being on drugs. Then, her unsung hero arrived and ensured she got the care she needed.
item.content:encoded: When Solitaire Miles was 18, she had a stroke. When she got to the hospital, doctors and nurses accused her of being on drugs. Then, her unsung hero arrived and ensured she got the care she needed.

item.title: “More, More, More,” the disco smash by the former adult film…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: “More, More, More,” the disco smash by the former adult film actress Andrea True, peaked on the Hot 100 50 years ago today. Can you name the Y2K hit that sampled it?
item.content:encoded: “More, More, More,” the disco smash by the former adult film actress Andrea True, peaked on the Hot 100 50 years ago today. Can you name the Y2K hit that sampled it?

item.title: In its depiction of the fall of Troy — and its lingering aft…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
In its depiction of the fall of Troy — and its lingering aftermath — Christopher Nolan's 'Odyssey' sends a clear message about the terrible costs of war.

Commentary: bit.ly/4gKiaEa
item.content:encoded:
In its depiction of the fall of Troy — and its lingering aftermath — Christopher Nolan's 'Odyssey' sends a clear message about the terrible costs of war.

Commentary: bit.ly/4gKiaEa

item.title: The revelations came out in a federal court case brought by …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The revelations came out in a federal court case brought by Democratic states challenging ICE's access to Medicaid data to aid in deportation efforts. n.pr/4f9OdMn
item.content:encoded: The revelations came out in a federal court case brought by Democratic states challenging ICE's access to Medicaid data to aid in deportation efforts. n.pr/4f9OdMn

item.title: Ashley Brouillette has identified her ex-husband, David Brou…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Ashley Brouillette has identified her ex-husband, David Brouillette, as the officer who fatally shot Joan Sebastián Durán Guerrero in Biddeford, Maine, on Monday. She said she learned he was the officer responsible when he called her on Wednesday. n.pr/44xGCBl
item.content:encoded: Ashley Brouillette has identified her ex-husband, David Brouillette, as the officer who fatally shot Joan Sebastián Durán Guerrero in Biddeford, Maine, on Monday. She said she learned he was the officer responsible when he called her on Wednesday. n.pr/44xGCBl

item.title: Steve Lacy Proves He’s One of His Era’s Defining Pop Auteurs…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Steve Lacy Proves He’s One of His Era’s Defining Pop Auteurs With ‘Oh Yeah?’

The singer-songwriter and multi-instrumentalist makes sincerity and absurdity sound like neighboring impulses on his restless, intimate new album.

Read our ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ review: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
Steve Lacy Proves He’s One of His Era’s Defining Pop Auteurs With ‘Oh Yeah?’

The singer-songwriter and multi-instrumentalist makes sincerity and absurdity sound like neighboring impulses on his restless, intimate new album.

Read our ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ review: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:

item.content:encoded:

item.title: The Spanish Men's National Team will face Argentina in Sunda…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Spanish Men's National Team will face Argentina in Sunday's World Cup final. The country's women's team lifted its first World Cup trophy in 2023.
item.content:encoded: The Spanish Men's National Team will face Argentina in Sunday's World Cup final. The country's women's team lifted its first World Cup trophy in 2023.

item.author: NME Home - Music, Film, TV, Gaming & Pop Culture News [Unoffici… (@nme.com.web.brid.gy)

item.title: Lo-fi psych-pop greats Olivia Tremor Control were a driving …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Lo-fi psych-pop greats Olivia Tremor Control were a driving force in Athens, GA’s Elephant 6 collective and released two cult-beloved albums in the ‘90s. Their surviving members finished this new double LP working from recordings and notes Will Cullen Hart left behind.

stereogum.com/2505601/the-...
item.content:encoded:
Lo-fi psych-pop greats Olivia Tremor Control were a driving force in Athens, GA’s Elephant 6 collective and released two cult-beloved albums in the ‘90s. Their surviving members finished this new double LP working from recordings and notes Will Cullen Hart left behind.

stereogum.com/2505601/the-...

item.author: NME Home - Music, Film, TV, Gaming & Pop Culture News [Unoffici… (@nme.com.web.brid.gy)

item.title: Cyclosporiasis, a foodborne illness that stems from fecal ma…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Cyclosporiasis, a foodborne illness that stems from fecal matter on produce, is adding a new, gross layer to an already rough season in Trump’s America.

Read: bit.ly/4hjI5ma
item.content:encoded:
Cyclosporiasis, a foodborne illness that stems from fecal matter on produce, is adding a new, gross layer to an already rough season in Trump’s America.

Read: bit.ly/4hjI5ma

item.title: The show, which will begin somewhere around 3:45 PM ET, will…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The show, which will begin somewhere around 3:45 PM ET, will air in the U.S. on Fox, Fox One and in Spanish on Telemundo, as well as on the Fox Sports app and streaming in Spanish on Peacock. It's expected to run for about 11 minutes. n.pr/4ytVE8H
item.content:encoded: The show, which will begin somewhere around 3:45 PM ET, will air in the U.S. on Fox, Fox One and in Spanish on Telemundo, as well as on the Fox Sports app and streaming in Spanish on Peacock. It's expected to run for about 11 minutes. n.pr/4ytVE8H

item.title: The decision comes two months after President Donald Trump m…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The decision comes two months after President Donald Trump met with Xi Jinping, potentially warming ties ahead of Xi's expected U.S. visit. n.pr/4vz9SCA
item.content:encoded: The decision comes two months after President Donald Trump met with Xi Jinping, potentially warming ties ahead of Xi's expected U.S. visit. n.pr/4vz9SCA

JAY-Z, Yankee Stadium, and how New York grew up with 'The Blueprint.'

item.title: Donald Trump is switching tactics to gin up public support f…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Donald Trump is switching tactics to gin up public support for his efforts to meddle with the 2026 midterms by claiming that foreign governments meddled in the 2020 election. He's right, but not in the way he thinks.

Read ↓
item.content:encoded:
Donald Trump is switching tactics to gin up public support for his efforts to meddle with the 2026 midterms by claiming that foreign governments meddled in the 2020 election. He's right, but not in the way he thinks.

Read ↓

item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)

item.content:encoded: Ambient, rap, R&B, and pop dissolve into blurry, liminal soundscapes on Everything Always Changes, For We’re Truly Here. Read our review of the new collaborative album.

item.title: President Trump's face will appear on a new commemorative co…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: President Trump's face will appear on a new commemorative coin honoring the nation's 250th birthday. It's one of the many unusual places his likeness has popped up this year. n.pr/3RDgrpQ
item.content:encoded: President Trump's face will appear on a new commemorative coin honoring the nation's 250th birthday. It's one of the many unusual places his likeness has popped up this year. n.pr/3RDgrpQ

item.title: The wait is over: Mikal Gilmore’s personal record collection…
item.author: Discogs (@discogsofficial.bsky.social)
item.description: The wait is over: Mikal Gilmore’s personal record collection is now live exclusively on Discogs via Permanent_Warehouse! Discover over 1,000 records from the legendary rock critic's personal archive, including test pressings, white-label promos, and more: https://disc.gs/4wwEcyB
item.content:encoded: The wait is over: Mikal Gilmore’s personal record collection is now live exclusively on Discogs via Permanent_Warehouse! Discover over 1,000 records from the legendary rock critic's personal archive, including test pressings, white-label promos, and more: https://disc.gs/4wwEcyB

item.title: Swapmeet was one of the buzziest international acts at this …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Swapmeet was one of the buzziest international acts at this year’s SXSW.

Today, they released their excellent debut album 'Mount Zero.'

Interview ↓
item.content:encoded:
Swapmeet was one of the buzziest international acts at this year’s SXSW.

Today, they released their excellent debut album 'Mount Zero.'

Interview ↓
